mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 100k jobs per month indicates robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100k monthly gains.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production above 1.5% monthly growth signals strong manufacturing activity that supports corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns remain negative in 50%+ of periods where INDPRO growth exceeds 1.5% monthly.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth combined with low inflation creates a 'Goldilocks' environment that boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in 40%+ of instances where both GDPC1 exceeds 0.5% and CPIAUCSL remains below 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles characterized by rising federal funds rates compress equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS increases by more than 0.5% monthly.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent growth in real sales (RSAFS) indicates strong consumer demand that drives corporate revenues, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in 50%+ of periods with sustained RSAFS growth.

mechanism_narrative: Weak housing starts below 1 million units signal deteriorating demand for construction, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where HOUST falls below 1 million units.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production combined with low unemployment indicates tight labor markets and robust manufacturing, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in 40%+ of instances where both INDPRO exceeds 100 and UNRATE remains below 4%.
